component.name: chatgpt-work-linux (Unofficial)
component.summary: Lightweight community Linux shell for the ChatGPT Work web experience

description.p: The chatgpt-work-linux application provides an isolated, lightweight GTK/WebKit desktop window for the official ChatGPT web service, plus native Linux global shortcuts, screenshot capture, downloads, permissions, diagnostics, and Chromium/browser compatibility fallbacks.

This is an independent community project. It is not produced, supported, or endorsed by OpenAI and does not include OpenAI application binaries. The desktop icon is the unmodified official ChatGPT application icon; OpenAI owns the icon and all ChatGPT marks.
Initial native Linux architecture and packaging.
